data.description_suggestion: Creates shareable verification links that can be distributed to users for identity verification. Accepts configuration parameters for link expiration, verification requirements, and redirect settings. Returns a verification link object containing the shareable URL and link metadata. Links enable asynchronous verification workflows without requiring direct API integration.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and use cases. Enhanced to explain what parameters are expected, what is returned, and the practical purpose of verification links for AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.
